case_title: ROBERT ALFRED BINION ET AL VS. ALAN TAK-CHEUNG TAM

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF DEC-02-2019
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$10.00) SERVED SEP-12-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, ALAN TAK-CHEUNG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED SEP-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, ALAN TAK-CHEUNG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ROBERT ALBERT BINION IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF TESSA KATHLEN NICHOLAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALAN TAK-CHEUNG TAM IS PRESENT DEFENDANT'S WITNESS NICHOLAS NGUYEN STATE FARM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BINION, ROBERT ALFRED NICHOLLS, TESSA KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, ALAN TAK-CHEUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED PER SEPARATE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FORMS SUBMITTED AND SIGNED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT BINION AND PLAINTIFF TESSA NICHOLLS. AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, ALAN TAK-CHEUNG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BINION, ROBERT ALFRED NICHOLLS, TESSA KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, ALAN TAK-CHEUNG $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,085.00, DEFENDANT ALAN TAK-CHEUNG TAM SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS ROBERT ALFRED BINION AND TESS KATHLEEN NICHOLAS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
